task_completion.description: Check if the sales_data.csv file is loaded into Power BI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'sales_data' table should be visible in the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI Desktop window.

task_completion.description: Check if the Revenue_Band calculated column is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Revenue_Band' field should be visible under the sales_data table in the Data/Fields pane, typically with a column icon.

task_completion.description: Check if the Avg_Sale and Order_Count measures are created
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Avg_Sale' and 'Order_Count' should be visible in the Data/Fields pane, indicated by calculator icons next to their names.

task_completion.description: Check if the report page is renamed to 'Channel Analysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom left of the report canvas should read 'Channel Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Check if the Line and Clustered Column Chart is created correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A combo chart should be visible on the canvas. The X-axis should show 'Online' and 'Retail'. It should have columns representing Order_Count and a line representing Avg_Sale.

task_completion.description: Check if the Treemap visual is created correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A treemap should be visible on the canvas, displaying rectangles for 'Bank Transfer', 'Cash', and 'Credit Card' (Payment_Method).

task_completion.description: Check if the report is saved as Channel_Analysis.pbix
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar at the top of the Power BI Desktop window should display 'Channel_Analysis' or 'Channel_Analysis.pbix'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Power BI Desktop interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the visuals are genuinely rendered on the canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts should display actual data bars/lines and treemap rectangles, not empty visual placeholders or static images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 1000 rows. Expected Order_Count is 1000. Expected Avg_Sale is approximately 5019.27. Sales_Channel categories are 'Online' and 'Retail'. Payment_Method categories are 'Bank Transfer', 'Cash', and 'Credit Card'. Revenue_Band distribution is heavily skewed to 'High' (957 records), with 43 'Medium' and 0 'Low'.
